name: Strawstacks
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, mix all ingredients except coconut. Cook without stirring until the temperature reaches 238 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Remove from heat and let cool for 30 minutes.
3. Beat the mixture until it thickens.
4. Add coconut and blend in well.
5. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto waxed paper to form strawstacks.
6. Makes about 60 pieces.
